notes: Issue #41 follow-up, authored by Claude. WAYBACK companion to the recent-only live recipe — and THIS is the substantive Indian source: probe --spread returns 793 snapshots vs the live recipe's 20 (a ~40x gain). Recipe-only, engine untouched. ONE recipe covers TWO site generations because the CDX prefix presidentofindia.nic.in/speeches prefix-matches both shapes: LEGACY /speeches-detail.htm?<id> (~562 captures, 2014-2023, old ASP.NET site — title h3.padB15, body div.speeches 5.6k-9.2k chars, date .date as '<Place> : DD.MM.YYYY') and MODERN /speeches/<slug> (~240 captures, 2023-2026, current Drupal — same layout the live recipe scrapes). Selector chains are ordered legacy-first then modern; first match wins per field. Probe verified BOTH generations green: legacy samples parsed 2017-01-05, 2017-11-05, 2018-04-10, 2019-08-17, 2021-07-27, 2023-01-23; modern samples parsed 2023-02-25, 2026-03-10. Spans THREE presidents (Pranab Mukherjee 2012-17, Ram Nath Kovind 2017-22, Droupadi Murmu 2022-) so speaker_default omitted — tenure crosscheck assigns from country+date (legacy titles also name the president explicitly). date_languages MUST stay [hi]: both generations use numeric DD.MM.YYYY and dateparser resolves ambiguous numerics by locale ([en] gives 01.07.2026 -> 2026-01-07, WRONG; [hi] -> 2026-07-01, RIGHT); the dots-only regex also avoids the slashed '.lastUpdated' (19/5/2014) and modern '16/07/2026' stamps. link_pattern excludes /speeches-detail-hi.htm (the Hindi mirror would double every legacy row); modern transliterated-Hindi slugs are NOT URL-distinguishable, so expect near-duplicate EN/HI pairs in the modern slice (downstream de-dup concern). wayback_to=20260602 bounds it at the live floor — note the live view is a ROLLING ~6-week window so that floor drifts; raise it if a re-run shows a gap. HOST CHOICE: nic.in has the deeper legacy archive (562 vs 361 on gov.in) and matches the live recipe's host; gov.in has more modern captures (523 vs 240) but serves the SAME content, so harvesting both hosts would duplicate every speech. country=India; source_url=https://presidentofindia.nic.in/speeches (via Internet Archive); source_name=presidentofindia.nic.in; source_type=official_gov; region=Asia; iso3n=356; content_format=fulltext. FULL RUN pending (researcher gate).
